summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for TUDOaqui SuperApp. All 8 module pages tested: Login, Dashboard, Eventos, Marketplace, Alojamento, Turismo, Imobiliario, Entregas, Restaurantes. OTP login flow works correctly. All navigation, tabs, search bars, and empty states function as expected. Mobile responsive design verified.

minor.issue: Rate limiter is aggressive - 5 login attempts per minute per IP, 3 OTPs per 5 minutes per phone. This caused some test delays during rapid test execution.

issues: Unused imports: 'Car' in Layout.js, 'Truck' and 'Clock' in Entregas.js, 'Car' in Imoveis.js, 'Star' in Marketplace.js - minor code quality issue, not affecting functionality

action_items: Remove unused imports to clean up ESLint warnings (optional, low priority)
critical_code_review_comments: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API client correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment
Error handling is implemented on all API calls
Loading states are shown during API calls
Empty states are displayed when no data is available
Mobile responsive design with bottom navigation works correctly
OTP login flow works correctly - phone validation, OTP generation, verification, and token storage
Logout flow clears tokens and redirects to login page
Entregas estimate form works correctly with API integration
Entregas page has working tabs (Minhas entregas/Estimar preco)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load, navigation works, forms submit correctly

test_credentials.otp_retrieval: su - postgres -c "psql -t -A -d tudoaqui -c \"SELECT codigo FROM otp_codes WHERE telefone='+244922334455' AND verificado=false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;\""

seed_data_creation: User created via OTP flow: +244922334455 (role: cliente)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend pages are working correctly. Database is empty so all module pages show empty states - this is expected behavior. Rate limiter may cause test delays if running tests rapidly. Wait 5 minutes between OTP requests for same phone number. SMS is MOCKED (sandbox mode) - OTPs are stored in PostgreSQL otp_codes table.

mocked_apis.sms_provider: Africa's Talking is in SANDBOX mode - OTPs are stored in PostgreSQL otp_codes table instead of being sent via real SMS

pages_tested.login: OTP login flow works - phone input, send OTP, verify OTP, redirect to dashboard
pages_tested.dashboard: Welcome banner, stats section (Estado: Online, Conta: cliente, Servicos: 8), 8 module cards
pages_tested.marketplace: Search bar, categories section, empty state 'Nenhum produto'
pages_tested.imoveis: Tabs (Imoveis/Agentes), search bar, empty states for both tabs
pages_tested.entregas: Tabs (Minhas entregas/Estimar preco), estimate form works with API, shows estimate result

navigation_tested.sidebar: All 8 navigation links work: Inicio, Eventos, Marketplace, Alojamento, Turismo, Imobiliario, Entregas, Restaurantes
navigation_tested.mobile_nav: Bottom navigation with 5 items works: Inicio, Evento, Market, Alojam, Turism
navigation_tested.logout: Both sidebar and mobile logout buttons work correctly

branding_verified.logo: TUDOAqui with red 'T' icon and yellow 'Aqui'
branding_verified.slogan: a sua vida em um so lugar
branding_verified.colors: Red primary, Yellow accent, Dark theme (dark-950 backgrounds)
